holdings.infoBox: KGRN is an equity ETF with a total of 53 individual holdings. The top holdings are BYD Co Ltd Class H stock at 8.10%, NIO Inc. at 6.28%, XPeng at 6.00%, Li Auto at 5.95%, and China Yangtze Power at 5.01%.

overview.description: The KraneShares MSCI China Clean Technology Index ETF (KGRN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI China IMI Environment 10-40 index. The fund tracks an index of Chinese companies that derive at least 50% of their revenue from products and services that benefit the environment. KGRN was launched on Oct 13, 2017 and is issued by KraneShares.
